programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher misteriosa se muda para uma pequena cidade e recomeça sua vida. Apesar da moça estar determinada a não formar laços afetivos na nova cidade, ela não consegue cumprir esse objetivo e acaba levantando questionamentos sobre seu passado. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Apenas Amigos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ao visitar sua cidade natal durante o Natal, um executivo fica cara a cara com sua antiga paixão do ensino médio, de quem era o melhor amigo - uma mulher cuja rejeição a ele o transformou em um mulherengo feroz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Perseguindo o Assassino, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Detetive chega em casa em seu aniversário de casamento e descobre que a esposa sofreu um acidente de carro. Sete meses depois, ela continua em coma e ele, incapaz de aceitar, se lança em uma caçada por um serial killer que tem como alvo os idosos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filha de Deus, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O detetive Scott Galban busca a verdade sobre a misteriosa morte de seu parceiro. Enquanto isso, Isabel de la Cruz, uma mulher local que diz ter sido testemunha de um milagre, começa a vivenciar estranhos acontecimentos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Dono da Festa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Van Wilder ficou famoso na cidade por organizar as melhores festas da faculdade. Porém, o veterano é forçado a mudar sua rotina de sete anos após perder a mesada do pai, deixando as festividades com os dias contados. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Reino Gelado 3 - Fogo e Gelo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O raro talento de se meter em problemas é o legado da família de Kai e Gerda. Crescidos, os irmãos se metem em um desastre de proporções globais, tudo para encontrar seus pais que estão desaparecidos após serem levados pelo Vento do Norte. Gêneros: Drama

programme.desc: When the satellites designed to control the global climate start to attack Earth, its a race to uncover the real threat before a worldwide Geostorm wipes out everything and everyone. Starring Gerard Butler, Jim Sturgess, Abbie Cornish.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Ministers funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders. Starring Gerard Butler, Aaron Eckhart, Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: The YPJ prepares to launch an attack on a camp where ISIS holds the kidnapped women; Ellie discovers the consequences of living under ISIS rules.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Nasser carries out his plan to escape the Islamic State; Nisrin leaves the YPJ in a desperate attempt to find her mother by herself.

programme.title: The Other Half
programme.desc: A woman with bipolar disorder and a grief-stricken man struggle to forge a simpler life. Starring Tom Cullen, Tatiana Maslany, Suzanne Clement.

programme.title: Born to Be Blue
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, jazz trumpeter Chet Baker (Ethan Hawke) begins a romance with an actress (Carmen Ejogo) while trying to stage a musical comeback. Starring Ethan Hawke, Carmen Ejogo, Callum Keith Rennie.

programme.title: Take This Waltz
programme.desc: A young woman (Michelle Williams) is torn between the husband (Seth Rogen) that she loves and a new man (Luke Kirby) in her life, whom shes unable to ignore. Starring Michelle Williams, Seth Rogen, Luke Kirby.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus fights to save the life of one of the Sanctuarys research scientists who is attacked by a seemingly docile Abnormal; baffled by the creatures behavior, Henry tries to see what, or who, caused the Abnormal to react so violently.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will goes up against the heads of the Sanctuary Network to defend Magnus who is charged with murder; as the evidence stacks up against her, even Will has trouble finding a way to convincingly defend her innocence.

programme.title: Tia and Piujuq
programme.desc: A 10-year-old Syrian refugee living in Montreal finds a magic portal leading to the Arctic. Starring Tia Bshara, Madeline Ivalu, Nuvvija Tulugarjuk.

programme.title: Muppets From Space
programme.desc: After learning about his origins, Gonzo must decide whether to seek his own kind or stay with friends. Starring Jeffrey Tambor, F. Murray Abraham, Rob Schneider.

programme.title: Ice Castles
programme.desc: A figure skater searches for inner strength after a tragic accident jeopardizes her future. Starring Taylor Firth, Rob Mayes, Henry Czerny.

programme.title: Still Mine
programme.desc: A farmer fights back when local authorities hamper his efforts to build a cottage for his dementia-stricken wife. Starring James Cromwell, Geneviève Bujold, Campbell Scott.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: A writer (Tobey Maguire) gets swept up in the affairs of Jazz Age New Yorks wealthy elite when he moves next-door to a mysterious millionaire (Leonardo DiCaprio) who throws lavish parties and pines for an unattainable woman (Carey Mulligan). Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Tobey Maguire, Carey Mulligan.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: An upper-class lawyer (Daniel Day-Lewis) falls in love with his fiancees (Winona Ryder) freethinking cousin (Michelle Pfeiffer) in the 1870s New York. Starring Daniel Day-Lewis, Michelle Pfeiffer, Winona Ryder.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: The archer and his Moorish companion join Sherwood Forest outlaws to fight against the sheriff of Nottingham, who desires to possess Maid Marian. Starring Kevin Costner, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Angel Has Fallen
programme.desc: Wrongfully accused of trying to kill the president, framed Secret Service agent Mike Banning must evade the FBI and his own agency to uncover the truth and save the country from imminent danger. Starring Gerard Butler, Morgan Freeman, Frederick Schmidt.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Sarya sacrifices everything to help Nisrin and free the kidnapped women; as ISIS searches for a traitor, the noose tightens around Nassers neck.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Sarya and her comrades prepare to attack the Sabaya camp, but the wrong timing might lead to a catastrophe.

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: A privileged man-child arrives at the beautiful and remote coastal cabin of his estranged father, whom he hasnt seen in 30 years. He quickly discovers that not only is his dad a jerk, he also has a shady past that is rushing to catch up with him. Starring Elijah Wood, Stephen McHattie, Martin Donovan.

programme.title: Tom at the Farm
programme.desc: A young man (Xavier Dolan) travels to an isolated farm for his lovers funeral where hes quickly drawn into a twisted, sexually charged game by his lovers aggressive brother (Pierre-Yves Cardinal). Starring Xavier Dolan, Pierre-Yves Cardinal, Lise Roy.

programme.title: Maliglutit
programme.desc: In 1913 in the Canadian Arctic, Kuanana returns from hunting to find his wife and daughter kidnapped and sets of to find the men who did it. Starring Benjamin Kunuk, Karen Ivalu, Jonah Qunaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While transporting a usually docile Abnormal, Magnuss helicopter crashes, leaving her and Will stranded in the shaft of an abandoned oil rig; they soon find they are not alone in the water.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While an old friend of Magnus, a pouched abnormal named Jimmy, is handing over a fire elemental to the Sanctuary team, they are attacked by a gang of criminal abnormals from Chicago; the situation presents a lot of mysteries to be solved quickly.

programme.title: Eve and the Fire Horse
programme.desc: A 9-year-old Chinese girl (Phoebe Jojo Kut) and her older sister (Hollie Lo) embrace their experiences at a Roman Catholic Sunday school. Starring Phoebe Jojo Kut, Hollie Lo, Vivian Wu.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: Abandoned by a disagreeable clown (Michael Jeter), a golden retriever with a knack for basketball befriends a lonely boy (Kevin Zegers). Starring Michael Jeter, Kevin Zegers, Wendy Makkena.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth is a man afraid of commitment up until he meets the beautiful Lucy. They hit it off and Henry think hes finally found the girl of his dreams, until he discovers she has short-term memory loss and forgets him the next day. Starring Adam Sandler, Drew Barrymore, Rob Schneider.

programme.title: Percy
programme.desc: Third-generation farmer Percy Schmeiser joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau to fight a monumental legal battle against a corporate giant. Starring Christopher Walken, Christina Ricci, Zach Braff.

programme.title: Miltons Secret
programme.desc: A man (Donald Sutherland) teaches his 11-year-old grandson (William Ainscough) how to cope with bickering parents and the neighborhood bully. Starring Donald Sutherland, Michelle Rodriguez, Mia Kirshner.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi teaches karate to an angry orphan being bullied at her high school. Starring Hilary Swank, Pat Morita, Michael Ironside.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: A sorority queen (Reese Witherspoon) enrolls in Harvard to prove to her former boyfriend that she has more than good looks. Starring Reese Witherspoon, Luke Wilson, Selma Blair.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White and Blonde
programme.desc: Fired from her firm, a young Boston lawyer (Reese Witherspoon) heads to Washington, D.C., to fight for animal rights. Starring Reese Witherspoon, Sally Field, Regina King.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Grieving writer Gia decides to write a book about womens desire; she interviews entrepreneur Sloane, homemaker Lina and student Maggie as they overturn their lives.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina flees from a stagnant marriage and a body of pain; she joins a womens group at Doctor Henrys, tries to reconnect with the love of her life, and begins a friendship with Gia.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Doting mother Dee Dee Blanchard and her sweet daughter Gypsy arrive in a new neighborhood, where Gypsy feels lonely due to a barrage of medical issues, but their new neighbors can be nosy, and Dee Dee and Gypsy have secrets to hide.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Dee Dee is on a high since Gypsy will be given the Child of the Year award, which makes Dee Dee feel like Mother of the Year, but before the event Gypsy has a dental emergency that gets the attention of a skeptical doctor who could expose secrets.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Dee Dee makes Gypsy play dress-up for a costume convention, where they each attract charming men who could complicate their insular relationship; Gypsy is starting to question the lies her mother tells her -- especially about how old she really is.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy is getting older and Dee Dee is forced into new legal maneuvers to keep control of her "little girl," but Dee Dee is limited by her health problems; Gypsy goes to greater lengths than ever to connect with men and experience a sexual awakening.

programme.title: Run This Town
programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: How She Move
programme.desc: Forced to return to public school after her sisters death, a young dancer (Rutina Wesley) has a rivalry with a classmate (Tre Armstrong) and joins an all-male dance troupe. Starring Rutina Wesley, Tre Armstrong, Dwain Murphy.

programme.title: One Day in the Life of Noah Piugattuk
programme.desc: A government agent tries to get an Inuit man and his children to move to settlement housing. Starring Kim Bodnia, Apayata Kotierk, Benjamin Kunuk.

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: A poor but hopeful boy seeks one of the five coveted golden tickets that will send him on a tour of Willy Wonkas mysterious chocolate factory. Starring Gene Wilder, Jack Albertson, Peter Ostrum.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) uses his superhuman powers to battle his archenemy, the Green Goblin (Willem Dafoe). Starring Tobey Maguire, Willem Dafoe, Kirsten Dunst.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Tormented Peter Parker battles a sinister scientist who uses mechanical tentacles for destructive purposes. Starring Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, James Franco.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Peter Parker undergoes an ominous transformation when his Spider-Man suit turns black and brings out the dark, vengeful side of his personality. Starring Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, James Franco.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: Man of Steel

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared. Starring Kit Harington, Natalie Portman, Jacob Tremblay.

programme.desc: Gene Kelly, Sammy Davis Jr., Mikhail Baryshnikov, Ray Bolger and Liza Minnelli narrate clips, from Busby Berkeley musicals to Michael Jackson performances. Starring Gina Trikonis, Carole DAndrea, Francesca Bellini.

programme.title: Man of a Thousand Faces

programme.title: Valentino
programme.desc: Reporters hear lurid tales at the funeral of silent-film sex symbol Rudolph Valentino (Rudolf Nureyev). Starring Rudolf Nureyev, Leslie Caron, Michelle Phillips.

programme.title: The Perils of Pauline
programme.desc: Unknown Pearl White (Betty Hutton) becomes "queen of the silent serials," famous as a heroine in distress. Starring Betty Hutton, John Lund, Billy De Wolfe.

programme.title: The Jolson Story
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, young Asa Yoelson decides to go against the wishes of his cantor father and pursue a career in show business. Starring Larry Parks, Evelyn Keyes, William Demarest.

programme.title: Jeanne Eagels
programme.desc: A 1920s dancer/actress (Kim Novak) leaves her jealous lover (Jeff Chandler) for Broadway, Hollywood and alcoholic decline. Starring Kim Novak, Jeff Chandler, Agnes Moorehead.

programme.title: Grand Hotel
programme.desc: A ballerina (Greta Garbo), baron (John Barrymore), stenographer (Joan Crawford), bookkeeper and tycoon check into Berlins Grand Hotel. Starring Greta Garbo, Joan Crawford, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Riptide
programme.desc: The wife (Norma Shearer) of an English lord (Herbert Marshall) has a grounds-for-divorce encounter with a playboy (Robert Montgomery) from her past. Starring Norma Shearer, Robert Montgomery, Herbert Marshall.

programme.title: A Night at the Opera
programme.desc: Groucho, Chico and Harpo go to Italy and bring opera and its patrons down to their level. Starring Groucho Marx, Harpo Marx, Kitty Carlisle Hart.

programme.title: Dark Victory
programme.desc: An heiress (Bette Davis) with only months to live embarks on a social whirl, then marries her doctor (George Brent). Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Humphrey Bogart.

programme.title: Til We Meet Again
programme.desc: A dying woman (Merle Oberon) and condemned man (George Brent) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring Merle Oberon, George Brent, Pat OBrien.

programme.title: The Constant Nymph
programme.desc: A 14-year-old teen adores a promising composer (Charles Boyer), who is quite fond of the girl (Joan Fontaine), but his romance with her older cousin (Alexis Smith) and following marriage create an emotional rivalry that affects the three. Starring Charles Boyer, Joan Fontaine, Alexis Smith.

programme.title: Of Human Bondage
programme.desc: Based on the novel by W. Somerset Maugham. A doctor-artist develops a tragic infatuation with a promiscuous waitress. Starring Eleanor Parker, Paul Henreid, Alexis Smith.

programme.title: Our Vines Have Tender Grapes
programme.desc: A Norwegian farmer (Edward G. Robinson) lovingly raises his daughter (Margaret OBrien) in Benson Junction, Wis. Starring Edward G. Robinson, Margaret OBrien, James Craig.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: A San Francisco police detective (Chevy Chase) protects a librarian (Goldie Hawn) who knows too much about a plot to kill the pope. Starring Goldie Hawn, Chevy Chase, Burgess Meredith.

programme.title: No Name on the Bullet
programme.desc: Townsfolk know a gunmans (Audie Murphy) going to kill someone, but they dont know who it will be. Starring Audie Murphy, Charles Drake, Joan Evans.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: A corporate climber (Jack Lemmon), whose boss (Fred MacMurray) and others use his apartment for hanky-panky, aids a young woman (Shirley MacLaine). Starring Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, Fred MacMurray.

programme.title: The Goodbye Girl
programme.desc: A divorced dancer (Marsha Mason) and her daughter (Quinn Cummings) must room with an off-off-Broadway actor (Richard Dreyfuss). Starring Richard Dreyfuss, Marsha Mason, Quinn Cummings.

programme.title: Alice in Movieland
programme.desc: Alice wins a free trip to Hollywood and dreams about her arrival. Starring Joan Leslie, Nana Bryant, Clara Blandick.

programme.title: The Devil Doll
programme.desc: Paul (Lionel Barrymore) is wrongfully convicted of robbery and murder, and breaks out of prison using a scientists shrinking invention. Starring Lionel Barrymore, Maureen OSullivan, Frank Lawton.

programme.title: Doctor X
programme.desc: A reporter (Lee Tracy) saves a mad doctors (Lionel Atwill) daughter (Fay Wray) from a full-moon killer with synthetic flesh. Starring Lionel Atwill, Fay Wray, Lee Tracy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An executed convict returns from the grave to revenge himself against the gangsters who framed him for murder. Starring Boris Karloff, Ricardo Cortez, Edmund Gwenn.

programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: March won an Oscar for his portrayal of the scientist whose experiments bring out a hideous side of his personality. Starring Fredric March, Miriam Hopkins, Rose Hobart.

programme.title: Men Must Fight
programme.desc: The secretary of states (Lewis Stone) wife (Diana Wynyard) and son (Phillips Holmes) oppose a 1940 war, ending with an air raid on New York. Starring Diana Wynyard, Lewis Stone, Phillips Holmes.

programme.title: Things to Come
programme.desc: William Cameron Menzies adaptation of the H.G. Wells novel tells of humankinds efforts to rebuild the war-torn planet. Starring Raymond Massey, Ralph Richardson, Margaretta Scott.

programme.title: Transatlantic Tunnel
programme.desc: An engineer (Richard Dix) leads the building of a trans-Atlantic tunnel linking Britain and the United States. Starring Richard Dix, Leslie Banks, Madge Evans.

programme.title: Non-Stop New York
programme.desc: Gangsters and a detective (John Loder) take an airliner to follow a British chorus girl (Anna Lee) who witnessed a murder. Starring Anna Lee, John Loder, Francis L. Sullivan.

programme.title: The Gunfighter
programme.desc: Upstarts challenge the fastest gun in the West, a haunted man (Gregory Peck) trying to escape his reputation. Starring Gregory Peck, Helen Westcott, Millard Mitchell.

programme.title: Duel in the Sun
programme.desc: Good and bad sons (Joseph Cotten, Gregory Peck) of a Texas cattle baron fight each other, and the railroad, over a dark beauty (Jennifer Jones). Starring Jennifer Jones, Gregory Peck, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: Shootout
programme.desc: An ex-gunman is torn between his obsession with revenge and his responsibility to a 6-year-old girl and a lonely widow. Starring Gregory Peck, Patricia Quinn, Robert F. Lyons.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: A bearded Scot (Gregory Peck) robs a bank with a young Indian (Desi Arnaz Jr.), then leaves him with an old ranchers young wife. Starring Gregory Peck, Desi Arnaz, Jack Warden.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: A former sea captain (Gregory Peck) goes West, woos women (Jean Simmons, Carroll Baker) and joins a fight over water rights. Starring Gregory Peck, Jean Simmons, Carroll Baker.

programme.desc: The history of 19th-century Western expansion, as seen through the lives of three generations of a pioneer family. Starring Carroll Baker, Lee J. Cobb, Henry Fonda.

programme.title: Tarzan the Magnificent
programme.desc: A clever crook and a romantic triangle complicate Tarzans efforts to bring a wanted criminal to justice. Starring Gordon Scott, Jock Mahoney, Betta St. John.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Hubie and Bertie are determined: they want to live in the house the cat Claude lives in; they drive Claude so mad that he prefers to sleep outside; now they have the whole house themselves.

programme.desc: An Arab chieftain (Sean Connery) abducts a U.S. widow (Candice Bergen) and her children; President Theodore Roosevelt (Brian Keith) sends the Marines. Starring Sean Connery, Candice Bergen, Brian Keith.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret a?air all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Good Mourning (2022)
programme.desc: A movie star must choose between pursuing his one true love or landing a life-changing role in a film.

programme.title: College (2008)
programme.desc: Three high-school seniors (Drake Bell, Andrew Caldwell, Kevin Covais) spend a wild weekend with members of Fairmont Universitys rowdiest fraternity.

programme.title: The Ledge (2011)
programme.desc: After an atheistic neighbor (Charlie Hunnam) has an affair with his wife, a vengeful Fundamentalist forces the man to choose between killing himself or allowing someone else to die in his place.

programme.title: Bucket List (2025)
programme.desc: When Ryan learns that hes been diagnosed with a rare, fatal illness his best friend Seth has other plans for him as he talks him into maxing out his credit cards and doing everything hes ever wanted to do from his Bucket List.

programme.title: The Return (2024)
programme.desc: After 20 years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca. The king finds much has changed since he left to fight in the Trojan War. No longer the mighty warrior his people remember, Odysseus must face his past to save his family.

programme.title: Freedoms Path (2022)
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, hes taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.title: Crisis (2021)
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her sons disappearance.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: World Trade Center (2006)
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.

programme.title: Shutter Island (2010)
programme.desc: A 1950s lawman (Leonardo DiCaprio) pursues a murderess who appears to have vanished from a locked room within a fortresslike psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: Two cyborgs from the future battle over the life of a teen (Edward Furlong) who will someday lead humanity against the machines.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate (2019)
programme.desc: Seasoned warrior Sarah Connor joins forces with a hybrid cyborg human and the T-800 model to protect a young woman from the Rev-9 -- a newly modified and seemingly indestructible liquid Terminator from the future.

programme.title: Run and Gun (2021)
programme.desc: A former criminal gets blackmailed into one last job to collect a mysterious package. After a deadly double-cross, he soon finds himself wounded and on the run from ruthless assassins who will stop at nothing to get what he has.

programme.title: The Corrupted (2019)
programme.desc: Released from prison, a talented boxer wants nothing more than to reconnect with his young son and live a quiet life. But when his brother gets on the wrong side of a shady developer, he must risk everything to save his sibling before its too late.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Vindicta (2023)
programme.desc: When a city is terrorized by a sadistic serial killer, a seasoned detective and a newly recruited paramedic are forced into a deadly game of vengeance, only to discover the key to stopping the bloodshed lies in unlocking the truth of their own pasts.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: Abandon (2002)
programme.desc: A detective (Benjamin Bratt) discovers new facts regarding the disappearance of a collegians (Katie Holmes) boyfriend (Charlie Hunnam) two years earlier.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy (1980)
programme.desc: A Texas farmer (John Travolta) moves to the city, immerses himself in honky-tonk and falls for a sexy cowgirl (Debra Winger).

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan (1998)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: No Code of Conduct (1998)
programme.desc: Two policemen (Mark Dacascos, Charlie Sheen) learn that city leaders and law enforcement support heroin trafficking across the Mexican border.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan (1998)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: V for Vengeance (2022)
programme.desc: After learning that their younger sister escaped an earlier kidnapping attempt that also killed their parents, two estranged sisters must join forces to rescue her from a group of bloodthirsty vampires.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Cypher (2002)
programme.desc: A man (Jeremy Northam) soon becomes confused about his own identity after he becomes a corporate spy for each of two rival firms.

programme.title: Most Wanted (2020)
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: Mob Town (2019)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Paycheck (2003)
programme.desc: After learning that his memory has been erased, a technical wizard (Ben Affleck) goes on the run to piece together clues from his past.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: Moscow, Washington and a CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) track a renegade Soviet captain (Sean Connery) and his new submarine.

programme.title: Mindhunters (2004)
programme.desc: A serial killer targets a group of FBI trainees (Jonny Lee Miller, Kathryn Morris) and a Philadelphia policeman (LL Cool J) on a deserted island.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friends wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: Loosies (2011)
programme.desc: A young pickpocket in the New York subways who is living a fast and free lifestyle is confronted by a woman with whom he had a one-night stand. She informs him that she is now pregnant with his child. He must now make a choice.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Match Point (2005)
programme.desc: A one-time tennis professional (Jonathan Rhys-Meyers) becomes obsessed with his brother-in-laws (Matthew Goode) seductive fiancee (Scarlett Johansson).

programme.title: Irenas Vow (2023)
programme.desc: Caught in a German roundup to be used as a slave laborer, Polish nurse Irena Gut becomes a German army majors housekeeper during World War II. Irena risks her life to conceal a dozen Jews within the majors home.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love (2024)
programme.desc: Nicholas and Isabel are made for each other, but as destiny pulls them together, family, passion and faith drives them apart. As they embark on journeys of heartache and misplaced love, fate soon contrives to pull the threads of their lives together.

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: Sheryl (2022)
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Sheryl Crow rises to superstardom and finds a way to turn even her darkest experiences into captivating, timeless work -- creating a legacy that continues to inspire and influence generations.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepards (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Rosemarys Baby (1968)
programme.desc: A pregnant womans (Mia Farrow) husband (John Cassavetes) and their satanic neighbors want her baby to be the Antichrist.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the worlds wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: The Quiet American (2002)
programme.desc: A veteran English journalist (Michael Caine) and a young man (Brendan Fraser) vie for the affection of a Vietnamese woman (Do Thi Hai Yen) in the 1950s.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bears territory.

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Nothing Compares (2022)
programme.desc: Following the career of singer Sinead OConnor through her rise to fame and how her iconoclastic personality led to her exile from the pop mainstream.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex OLoughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and 40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: Kate and Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-crack addict (Halle Berry) fights for custody of her son adopted by a social worker (Jessica Lange) and her husband (David Strathairn).

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: The Evening Star (1996)
programme.desc: A spunky woman (Shirley MacLaine) copes with her troubled adult grandchildren, feuds with an enemy and has a fling with a younger man (Bill Paxton).

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-crack addict (Halle Berry) fights for custody of her son adopted by a social worker (Jessica Lange) and her husband (David Strathairn).

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: Heartburn (1986)
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat, a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman, a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.
